## What changed
Added a standard Pull Request template and self-review checklist.
Updated the README.md with clearer setup and run instructions.

## Why
To improve PR quality and give reviewers better context. This helps speed up the review process and keeps our documentation sharp.

## How to test
Template: Open a dummy PR to see if the new template loads.
Checklist: Verify pr-checklist.md is in the docs/ folder.
README: Follow the updated setup steps to make sure the project runs.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No debug code left in
